form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Most recently finished 5th in a NG on April 2 over 324m at this track behind Storms Will Roll beaten 5.5 lengths (17.74). Must be included.

form.formComment: Having his first run at Richmond Straight. Comes off an average run last start over 457m at Temora when seventh behind Where's Fernando (26.43) in NG. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 1.5 lengths in a NG last start at this track, recording a superb 17.37 over the 324m journey. Bold showing expected again.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at Bulli when a 0.8 lengths second but did clock a fast 22.39 over the 400m trip. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 324m. Last start finished 3rd on April 2 over 324m at this track behind Storms Will Roll beaten 1.75 lengths (17.50) in a NG. In the minors two starts back. Winning chance on best form.

form.formComment: Finished fourth (17.87) last start at this track. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Tough draw to overcome and needs to find best form to feature.

form.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on January 24 at Wentworth Park over 520m. Last start was second over 324m in 17.47, behind Storms Will Roll. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by 2 lengths in a Grade 3/4 at this track and recording an excellent 17.55 over the 324m journey. Expected to push the clock again here.
